title: ServiceAccount
description: A Google Cloud IAM service account resource used to represent an identity for applications and workloads.

name.description: Resource name of the service account in the format projects/{project}/serviceAccounts/{email}.

projectId.description: ID of the project that owns the service account.

uniqueId.description: Unique numeric ID of the service account.

email.description: Email address of the service account.

displayName.description: Human-readable name for the service account.

description.description: Optional description of the service account.

disabled.description: Whether the service account is disabled.

etag.description: Entity tag for optimistic concurrency control.

oauth2ClientId.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID for the service account.
